designSystem.name: Olive Green Martinborough Design System
designSystem.philosophy: Clean, modern design with a focus on natural elements, quality, and approachability. The design balances sophistication with warmth, reflecting the connection to nature and community.
designSystem.note: This file is the single source of truth for all design decisions. Use scripts/sync-design-system.js to validate configurations and scripts/generate-tailwind-config.js to generate Tailwind config from this file.

oliveGreen.usage: Primary background for header, navigation, and key UI elements. Represents nature and natural elements. Olive green tone (OliveDrab).
oliveGreen.contrast: Use with white or light text for optimal readability

goldenYellow.usage: Logo and brand accent color. Represents quality, premium, and warmth.
goldenYellow.contrast: Use on dark backgrounds for maximum impact

lightBlue.usage: Background for content sections, providing contrast and breathing room.
lightBlue.contrast: Use with black or dark text

deepPurple.usage: Use for accents, overlays, gradients, or depth. Complements the olive green palette.

white.usage: Primary text color on dark backgrounds, hero text overlays, and clean backgrounds.
white.contrast: High contrast on olive green and purple backgrounds

black.usage: Primary text color on light backgrounds, headings, and body text.
black.contrast: High contrast on light blue and white backgrounds

modern.family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
modern.usage: Logo and brand name. Modern, clean, contemporary feel.

sansSerif.usage: Body text, navigation, and UI elements. Modern, clean, and readable.

logo.usage: Brand name display - 'THE' smaller (text-xs), 'OLIVE GREEN' larger (text-3xl), stacked vertically. Uses modern sans-serif font stack with semibold weight for main text and wider tracking for 'THE'.
logo.fontFamily: modern (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif)
logo.letterSpacing: wider tracking for 'THE', tighter tracking for 'OLIVE GREEN'

hero.usage: Main hero heading - bold, impactful statement

heading.usage: Section headings like 'NATURE FIRST' - strong, clear hierarchy

body.usage: Paragraph text, descriptions, and body content

navigation.usage: Navigation links - clear, readable, uppercase styling

uppercase.usage: Navigation items, announcements - creates emphasis and structure

case.usage: Body text and headings use standard sentence case

spacing.principle: Generous spacing creates breathing room and emphasizes content hierarchy. Use consistent spacing units throughout.

sectionSpacing.note: Sections flow seamlessly into each other with no gaps, creating full-width visual blocks

componentSpacing.heroPadding: generous vertical padding to create impact

structure.principle: Full-width sections stacked vertically. Each section is a distinct visual block with its own background color.

grid.principle: Flexible, responsive grid system. Content can be centered, left-aligned, or split into columns.
grid.maxWidth: Full width for sections, content can be constrained for readability

alignment.header: Logo left, navigation center-right, cart/login far right
alignment.content: Split layouts with clear visual separation

header.description: Full-width navigation bar with olive green background

logo.style: modern sans-serif font stack, golden-yellow color (#d4af37), stacked text, bold weight for 'OLIVE GREEN', normal weight for 'THE'
logo.letterSpacing: wider tracking for 'THE', tighter tracking for 'OLIVE GREEN'
logo.fontFamily: modern font stack: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Inter, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif

header.height: sufficient to accommodate logo, announcement, and navigation comfortably

hero.description: Large, impactful section with background image and text overlay

background.style: slightly blurred or soft focus, close-up of natural elements

supportingText.position: to the right of main heading
supportingText.style: medium size, white text, readable blocks

designElements.diagonalShapes: Optional geometric shapes or lines for visual interest and depth

hero.height: full viewport or substantial height for impact

contentSection.description: Light background section with text content

rightColumn.style: black, sans-serif, medium size, normal weight

links.hover: subtle interaction (underline, color change, or opacity)

navigation.active: indicate current page with subtle styling

buttons.baseClasses: px-xl py-md font-sans text-base uppercase tracking-wide transition-all duration-200

primary.description: Primary action button with olive green background

primaryAccent.description: Accent button with golden yellow background

secondary.description: Secondary button with transparent background and white border
secondary.tailwindClasses: bg-transparent text-white border-2 border-white hover:bg-white hover:text-olive-green

secondaryDark.description: Secondary button with transparent background and olive green border
secondaryDark.tailwindClasses: bg-transparent text-olive-green border-2 border-olive-green hover:bg-olive-green hover:text-white

icons.color: white on dark backgrounds, black on light backgrounds

default.tailwindClasses: bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded overflow-hidden transition-transform hover:scale-105

elevated.tailwindClasses: bg-white shadow-lg rounded overflow-hidden transition-transform hover:scale-105

dark.tailwindClasses: bg-olive-green text-white rounded overflow-hidden transition-transform hover:scale-105

natureFirst.description: Design reflects connection to nature and natural elements
natureFirst.manifestation: Natural imagery, organic shapes, color palette inspired by nature

quality.manifestation: Clean typography, generous spacing, thoughtful color choices, modern logo font for contemporary sophistication

approachability.manifestation: Readable fonts, clear hierarchy, friendly tone, balanced sophistication

clarity.manifestation: Strong contrast, distinct sections, clear typography scale, organized layout

breathingRoom.manifestation: Ample padding, comfortable line heights, space between elements

imagery.style: Natural, close-up photography of natural elements
imagery.treatment: Slightly soft focus or subtle blur for depth, rich colors
imagery.usage: Full-width backgrounds, hero sections, supporting content

shapes.usage: Optional diagonal lines or shapes for visual interest and transitions

effects.overlays: Text overlays directly on images with sufficient contrast
effects.interactions: Subtle hover effects, clean state changes

responsive.principle: Design adapts gracefully across screen sizes

breakpoints.mobile: Stack navigation, adjust text sizes, full-width sections maintained
breakpoints.tablet: Adjust column layouts, maintain spacing principles
breakpoints.desktop: Full layout as designed, optimal viewing experience

colorApplication.oliveGreen: Use for headers, navigation bars, primary backgrounds, and key UI elements. Olive green tone (#6B8E23 - OliveDrab) provides natural, earthy foundation. Excellent contrast with white text.
colorApplication.goldenYellow: Reserve for logo and premium accents - use sparingly for maximum impact. Creates warmth and premium feel against olive green backgrounds.
colorApplication.lightBlue: Use for content sections, providing visual breaks and contrast. Soft, calming background for extended reading.
colorApplication.deepPurple: Use for gradients, accents, and depth. Works well in hero backgrounds and overlays.
colorApplication.white: Primary text on dark backgrounds (especially olive green), clean backgrounds, hero text overlays
colorApplication.black: Primary text on light backgrounds (especially light blue), body content, headings

typographyApplication.modern: Exclusively for logo/brand name - modern sans-serif font stack with system font fallbacks. Use bold weight for main brand text, normal weight for 'THE'. Apply wider letter spacing to 'THE' and tighter spacing to main text.
typographyApplication.sansSerif: All other text - navigation, headings, body, UI elements. Standard sans-serif for maximum compatibility.
typographyApplication.hierarchy: Maintain clear size differentiation - hero (text-6xl/7xl) > heading (text-5xl) > body (text-base) > small (text-sm/xs)

weights.logo: bold for main text, normal for 'THE'
weights.heading: bold

spacingApplication.sections: No gaps between major sections - seamless flow
spacingApplication.text: Comfortable line heights and paragraph spacing

imageryApplication.overlay: Ensure text contrast on images - white text on dark images
imageryApplication.quality: High-quality photography that reflects brand values

components.Header: Full-width navigation with logo, announcement bar, navigation links, and user actions
components.Hero: Large section with background image/gradient and text overlay
components.Button: Primary, primaryAccent, secondary, and secondaryDark variants
components.Navigation: Uppercase navigation links with hover states
components.ContentSection: Split layout sections with headings and body text
components.Icon: Simple line icons (cart, user, menu, close, arrow)
components.TextBlock: Typography components with various heading sizes
components.Logo: Stacked brand name with modern font
components.CartIcon: Shopping cart icon with count badge

implementation.sourceOfTruth: design.json is the single source of truth. All configurations should be derived from this file.

scripts.sync: npm run sync:design - Validates that Tailwind config matches design.json
scripts.generate: npm run generate:tailwind - Generates tailwind.config.js from design.json
